battle_level.source: Today 2025-10-06 premarket high (PMH) — tested premarket, rejected -$1.62; first RTH overhead and key bull/bear decision line

predictions.claim: PMH 671.63 acts as RTH resistance cap; SPY fails to close a 5m bar above 671.63 within the first 60

predictions.reason: narrative grading needed for vix_macro prediction
predictions.claim: VIX remains above 16.50 through the first hour of RTH, sustaining mild risk-off tone and preventing clean bullish moment

predictions.reason: narrative grading needed for technical prediction
predictions.claim: 5m ribbon does not achieve clean BULL stack (≥20c spread) before 10:30 ET; price oscillates in chop zone between PML 669
predictions.invalidation: 5m ribbon spread reaches ≥20c BULL stack within first 3 RTH bars (by 10:00 ET)

narrative: The key tension today is macro's bullish overnight-gap thesis (+$1.17 gap, zero events) versus real-time premarket price rejection (-$1.62 from PMH 671.63), a MIXED ribbon at only 16c spread (clean threshold: 20c+), and XLK underperformance (-0.59% vs XLF +0.56% — a tug-of-war, not risk-on rotation)
